payload.answer: Store the CSV table in a columnar format (e.g., Parquet) with dictionary encoding and an index on the id column to efficiently handle repetition and enable fast lookups.
payload.decision: Store as a structured table in a columnar format with deduplication and indexing on id for efficient retrieval
